channel.title: Cli on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Cli on Arrans github.io

item.title: junegunn/fzf
item.description: 🌸 A command-line fuzzy finder

item.title: beetbox/beets
item.description: music library manager and MusicBrainz tagger

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.

item.title: charmbracelet/vhs
item.description: Your CLI home video recorder 📼

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: BurntSushi/ripgrep
item.description: ripgrep recursively searches directories for a regex pattern while respecting your gitignore

item.title: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
item.description: 🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,300+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool so that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

item.title: alebcay/awesome-shell
item.description: A curated list of awesome command-line frameworks, toolkits, guides and gizmos. Inspired by awesome-php.

item.title: sharkdp/fd
item.description: A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to ‘find’

item.title: yorukot/superfile
item.description: Pretty fancy and modern terminal file manager

item.title: Rigellute/spotify-tui
item.description: Spotify for the terminal written in Rust 🚀

item.title: cli/cli
item.description: GitHub’s official command line tool

item.title: TheZoraiz/ascii-image-converter
item.description: A cross-platform command-line tool to convert images into ascii art and print them on the console. Now supports braille art!

item.title: ClementTsang/bottom
item.description: Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.

item.title: pvolok/mprocs
item.description: Run multiple commands in parallel

item.title: asdf-vm/asdf
item.description: Extendable version manager with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang & more

item.title: rebuy-de/aws-nuke
item.description: Nuke a whole AWS account and delete all its resources.

item.title: wallix/awless
item.description: A Mighty CLI for AWS

item.title: privatenumber/tsx
item.description: ⚡️ TypeScript Execute | The easiest way to run TypeScript in Node.js

item.title: dundee/gdu
item.description: Fast disk usage analyzer with console interface written in Go

item.title: google/zx
item.description: A tool for writing better scripts

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: The shell-like, command line terminal file manager: simple, fast, extensible, and lightweight as hell.

item.title: danvergara/dblab
item.description: The database client every command line junkie deserves.

item.title: sachaos/viddy
item.description: 👀 A modern watch command. Time machine and pager etc.

item.title: amanusk/s-tui
item.description: Terminal-based CPU stress and monitoring utility

item.title: TomWright/dasel
item.description: Select, put and delete data from JSON, TOML, YAML, XML and CSV files with a single tool. Supports conversion between formats and can be used as a Go package.

item.title: muesli/gitty
item.description: Contextual information about your git projects, right on the command-line

item.title: muesli/duf
item.description: Disk Usage/Free Utility - a better ‘df’ alternative

item.title: wader/fq
item.description: jq for binary formats - tool, language and decoders for working with binary and text formats

item.title: antfu-collective/ni
item.description: 💡 Use the right package manager

item.title: manifoldco/promptui
item.description: Interactive prompt for command-line applications

item.title: Delta456/box-cli-maker
item.description: Make Highly Customized Boxes for CLI

item.title: skx/critical
item.description: A simple/minimal TCL interpreter, written in golang

item.title: darylhjd/mangadesk
item.description: Terminal client for MangaDex 📖

item.title: donnemartin/saws
item.description: A supercharged AWS command line interface (CLI).

item.title: mergestat/mergestat-lite
item.description: Query git repositories with SQL. Generate reports, perform status checks, analyze codebases. 🔍 📊

item.title: guptarohit/asciigraph
item.description: Go package to make lightweight ASCII line graph ╭┈╯ in command line apps with no other dependencies.

item.title: hartwork/resolve-march-native
item.description: 🐌 Tool to determine what GCC flags -march=native would resolve into

item.title: mrusme/neonmodem
item.description: Neon Modem Overdrive

item.title: psanford/wormhole-william
item.description: End-to-end encrypted file transfer. A magic wormhole CLI and API in Go (golang).

item.title: thehowl/claws
item.description: Awesome WebSocket CLient - an interactive command line client for testing websocket servers

item.title: arran4/sentencestats
item.description: Tools to plot character usage in sentences

item.title: arran4/git-tag-inc
item.description: Yet another semantic version incrementor and tagger for git

item.title: arran4/podcast-cdr-manager
item.description: CLI tool to help manage podcast subscriptions for burning to CDROMs / CDR / CDRW

item.title: rstemmer/musicdb
item.description: 🎧 A music manager with focus on remote access to your music by having a WebUI and providing an audio stream.

item.title: padok-team/yatas
item.description: 🦉🔎 A simple tool to audit your AWS/GCP infrastructure for misconfiguration or potential security issues with plugins integration

item.title: dongyx/hardv
item.description: A Powerful Flashcard Program for Linux, macOS, and Other Unix-like Systems

item.title: dtgorski/typex
item.description: [TOOL/CLI] - Filter and examine Go type structures, interfaces and their transitive dependencies and relationships. Export structural types as TypeScript value object or bare type representations.

item.title: alexhallam/fwdt
item.description: 🔥 📝 (fwdt) “few word do trick” is a cross platform manual fast logger
